'''Droekle''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Hapan]] who was one of [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]]'s courtiers and had lost his left [[Limb/Legends|hand]] in a "fencing accident" to the Queen Mother as did most of her courtiers to mirror the loss of her hand to [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
